data.title: Implement id_validate.py: cross-artifact ID-linkage validation
data.description:
## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/id_validate.py with validate_id_linkage() that validates ID consistency across all three manifest artifacts.

## testing_mode: RED — new behavioral content. Depends on RED test task a6b2-13f8.

## Interface
validate_id_linkage(spatial_layout: dict, svg_content: str, tokens_md: str) -> list[dict]
Returns: list of violation dicts: [{id: str, artifact: str, violation_type: 'missing'|'orphaned'}]
Empty list = clean linkage.

## Implementation Steps
1. Extract component IDs from spatial_layout['components'] recursively
2. Extract <g id=...> values from svg_content using xml.etree.ElementTree or regex
3. Extract component ID references from tokens_md (look for component id patterns in the markdown)
4. For each spatial ID: check if present in SVG <g> ids (missing → violation); check if referenced in tokens.md (missing → violation)
5. For each SVG <g> id: check if in spatial IDs (orphaned → violation)
6. Return consolidated violations list

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/id_validate.py exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/id_validate.py
- [ ] pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_id_validate.py exits 0 (IV-1 through IV-6 pass)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_id_validate.py --tb=short -q
- [ ] Uses stdlib only for XML parsing (no lxml)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'lxml' plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/id_validate.py
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
